provider identification numbers in the NCPDP 
pharmacy data. 

This variable usually represents a unique pharmacy entity, which historically was a retail store. 
However, as the pharmacy industry has evolved, some retail stores have added other lines of business, 
such as filling prescriptions for long-term care facilities. In these cases, the pharmacy can ask NCPDP to 
issue them more than one identification number to keep the billing separate for their multiple lines of 
business.
